description: Math determinism: transcendental/rounding functions are deterministic; Math.random is unavailable in deterministic mode.

tolerance.notes: Math.random is NEUTRALIZED in deterministic mode (the host realm replaces it with a throwing stub; the only randomness is the seeded ctx.random seam). A call must throw IDENTICALLY on every engine — the applet normalizes to error.name. IEEE-754 deterministic functions (sqrt, round-half-up, trunc, hypot, sign, clz32, cbrt, fround) must be byte-identical; transcendental fns (sin/exp) are implementation-defined in the last ULP, so this vector pins only the exactly-specified ones.
